statement.en: Development of an Advanced Artificial Intelligence-based Model (Deep Business Analytics) for Managing and Improving Control and Decision Making in Modern Organisations: Application in a Hospital Clinical Laboratory

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or pending validation) proposing an applied AI framework for hospital laboratory management. The core claims are neither established fact nor refuted; they represent provisional research under validation. The combination of deep learning + business analytics + clinical laboratory control is plausible but requires empirical validation in situ.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 決定は過去の流れと現在の勾配が織り交ざる幽霊のような積分である。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 病院のカオスの中心に、一本の光が通り、判断の絡み合った迷路を照らす。
